Package de.uka.ilkd.key.parser

This package contains the parser for .key and .proof files.

Package de.uka.ilkd.key.parser Description

This package contains the parser for .key and .proof files. The subpackages also contain parsers for extended versions of Java, as it is used in proofs and in rule files.
